short_description: Financial inclusion scheme providing zero-balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card and insurance benefits.
detailed_description: Pradhan Mantri Jan-Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) is National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, Banking/ Savings & Deposit Accounts, Remittance, Credit, Insurance, Pension in an affordable manner. The scheme offers zero-balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card, accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh, and overdraft facility up to ₹10,000 for eligible account holders.
key_benefits: RuPay debit card with free accident insurance of ₹2 lakh
Overdraft facility up to ₹10,000 for eligible accounts
Access to insurance and pension products
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) of government schemes
financial_assistance: Banking services + ₹2 Lakh accident insurance + ₹10,000 overdraft
other_conditions: Aadhaar linking mandatory for DBT benefits
Overdraft facility available after 6 months of satisfactory operation
RuPay card usage activates accident insurance
Account can be opened at any bank branch or Business Correspondent
application_steps_online: Look for PMJDY account opening option
Fill online application form with personal details
Visit branch for account activation and RuPay card collection
application_steps_offline: Visit nearest bank branch or Business Correspondent
Collect RuPay debit card within 30 days

submission_locations.address: Any bank branch or Business Correspondent point
submission_locations.notes: Can also open at CSC centers and camp sites

faq.question: Is there any charge for opening PMJDY account?
faq.answer: No, PMJDY accounts are completely free with zero balance requirement and no account maintenance charges.

faq.question: How do I get the overdraft facility?
faq.answer: Overdraft facility of up to ₹10,000 is available after 6 months of satisfactory account operation and is subject to bank's assessment.

faq.question: Is the RuPay card free?
faq.answer: Yes, RuPay debit card is provided free of cost with the account, and it comes with ₹2 lakh accident insurance cover.

common_rejection_reasons: Already have PMJDY account in another bank
tips_for_successful_application: Carry original Aadhaar card for verification
Link mobile number for SMS alerts
Activate RuPay card immediately to avail insurance
Use account regularly to become eligible for overdraft
